screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_overview: 007系列電影，這回007（史恩康納萊飾）槓上世界首富金手指，金手指打算在銀行內引爆核彈擾亂全球金融體制，007負責調查金手指走私黃金的方法並阻止他的陰謀。值得一提的是本片的新噱頭，龐德女郎（雪莉伊頓飾）全身塗滿金漆，死在龐德的床上。
tmdb_overview_en: Special agent 007 comes face to face with one of the most notorious villains of all time, and now he must outwit and outgun the powerful tycoon to prevent him from cashing in on a devious scheme to raid Fort Knox -- and obliterate the world's economy.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
director: 克莉絲汀史都華 Kristen STEWART
country: 法國 France、英國 UK、拉脫維亞 Latvia、美國USA
synopsis: 2025 坎城影展一種注目單元 Un Certain Regard, Cannes FF 2025 法國杜維爾影展新銳獎 Revelation Prize, Deauville American FF 2025 台北金馬影展 Taipei Golden Horse FF 水、雨、淚、河、泳池、血、藥物、酒與書寫；成長於暴力與酗酒陰影下的莉狄亞，童年在失守的家庭中破碎失語。長大後，她在慾望與自毀邊緣反覆跌撞，創傷如影隨形，直到文學成為出口。她書寫在傷痕與身體記憶之中，重新奪回自身的聲音與敘事權。 本片改編自美國作家的同名回憶錄，好萊塢一線女演員克莉絲汀史都華堅決以此作為其首部編導長片，費時七年尋覓資金又拍攝短片作為前置習作，終煉一劍。影像如記憶碎片，在斑駁光影裡交織靈光與傷痕，卻讓觀眾保持在「情感安全」距離，見證一場走向重生的細膩告白。
source_language_note: 發音：英語 字幕：中文
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: 當小女孩蛻變成少女，母親的沉默、姊姊的逃離，讓家成了失守的疆界。父親的低語迴繞在耳邊，如影隨形，無處可逃。那些童年囚困在家庭裡的記憶，早已將她的心撕裂成碎片。長大後，她在酒池肉林裡跌撞，在親密關係裡失控，但命運仍緊追在後，無聲地朝她猛烈重擊。她試圖用寫作重新拾起破碎自我，在過去的幽暗長河裡長出生命，書寫那段傷痕累累的赤裸告白。
tmdb_overview_en: Plagued by an abusive childhood, a woman finds escape in competitive swimming, sexual experimentation, toxic relationships, and addiction before ultimately finding her voice through writing.

synopsis: 李哲洋，一位50年代的白色青年，終生飽受壓抑，但披荊斬棘出一條特異之路。他是臺灣民歌採集運動的拓荒者，並主編了近二十年的音樂文摘，翻譯了大量音樂著作，散播音樂的智慧與美，影響1970~90年代的臺灣愛樂者。他踽踽獨行的音樂人生，卻被臺灣音樂史給遺忘。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 李哲洋，一位50年代的白色青年，終生飽受壓抑，但披荊斬棘出一條特異之路。他是臺灣民歌採集運動的拓荒者，並主編了近二十年的音樂文摘，翻譯了大量音樂著作，散播音樂的智慧與美，影響1970~90年代的臺灣愛樂者。他踽踽獨行的音樂人生，卻被臺灣音樂史給遺忘。
synopsis_en: Li Zhe-yang was a youth of the 1950s White Terror era who endured a lifetime of suppression, yet he forged a singular and extraordinary path through the thorns. A pioneer of the Taiwan Folk Song Collection Movement, he spent nearly twenty years as the editor-in-chief of *Music Digest* and translated a vast body of musical literature. By spreading the wisdom and beauty of music, he profoundly influenced generations of Taiwanese music lovers from the 1970s through the 1990s. However, his solitary journey through the world of music has been largely forgotten by the history of Taiwanese music.

synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★2011 坎城影展 ★2011 金馬獎最佳視覺效果、最佳動作設計等3項大獎；最佳男配角、最佳音效等３項提名 ★2012 亞洲電影大獎最佳攝影、最佳原創音樂等3項大獎；最佳視覺效果提名 俠客劉金喜（甄子丹飾）隱姓埋名，與妻子阿玉（湯唯飾）和一雙兒子生活在一處偏遠的小村莊，卻被捲入一樁離奇的命案。捕快徐百九（金城武飾）是一位"武癡"，在查案的過程中，嗅到了劉金喜身上必有過人之處。不料，卻因為他的好奇，迫使劉金喜面臨和七十二地煞教主（王羽飾）的生死對決，他的家庭危在旦夕，他們的家園，遭受滅頂之災...... https://reurl.cc/18W3OD
tmdb_overview: 故事背景為1917年中國雲南騰衝的劉家村。 劉金喜（甄子丹 飾）和妻子（湯唯 飾）阿玉共同撫養著兩個兒子方正（鄭偉 飾）和曉天（李家民 飾），日子過得平淡安寧。有一天，外地來的兩名劫匪企圖洗劫村中的櫃坊，被剛好在此的金喜撞見，一陣混亂打鬥過後，二名匪徒稀里糊塗被劉金喜打死。死去的匪徒其中一人是政府十大通緝要犯閻東生，因此縣官大喜過望，村裏人也將劉金喜奉為大英雄。 不過，這看似普普通通的盲打誤殺卻引起一個人的懷疑，他就是縣衙捕快徐百九（金城武 飾）。從蛛絲馬跡上來看，二匪皆是死於武功高人之手，以劉金喜區區造紙工人的身手，不可能將兩人打死。徐百九因此留在村裏，對劉金喜展開了連番的觀察、調查與試探，後來終於發現，原來劉金喜的真實身分，其實是「七十二地煞」的二當家唐龍。 當徐百九回到縣城後，便向當地衙門拿取牌令準備捉拿唐龍，卻不知衙門的負責人將這件事情密報給了「七十二地煞」的教主（王羽 飾），也就是唐龍的師傅。在徐百九的警隊到達劉家村之前，「七十二地煞」的人馬早已搶先一步到達，劉家村也陷入了即將滅頂的危機之中……
tmdb_overview_en: A sinful martial arts expert wants to start a new tranquil life, only to be hunted by a determined detective and his former master.

synopsis: 矽科技時代，微小的晶片隱身在我們的生活之中，每分每秒控制著世界的運轉。半世紀過去，當年的半導體的種子已然成為一棵大樹守護著臺灣，影片訪問超過80位見證半導體發展的關鍵人物，從當年的第一批工程師、女作業員、相關政策與科技界前輩，再到今日面臨抉擇的年輕工程師，深度呈現了臺灣半導體產業如何從無到有，再蛻變成為全球科技發展的重要推手，這段跨越半世紀的紀錄片電影，見證了臺灣重要的一頁近代史。
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 中文發音/中、英文字幕
tmdb_overview: 首部刻劃台灣半導體發展史的紀錄片電影，影片訪問超過80位見證半導體發展的關鍵人物，從當年的第一批工程師、女作業員、相關政策與科技界前輩，再到今日面臨抉擇的年輕工程師，深度呈現了台灣半導體產業如何從無到有，再蛻變成為全球科技發展的重要推手，這段跨越半世紀的紀錄片電影，見證了台灣重要的一頁近代史。
tmdb_overview_en: A Chip Odyssey features interviews with over 80 key figures who witnessed and shaped the development of the semiconductor industry — from the first generation of engineers and female factory workers, to policymakers and technology veterans, and today’s young engineers facing new crossroads. This feature-length documentary chronicles how Taiwan built its semiconductor industry from scratch and transformed it into a global technological force, capturing a vital and transformative chapter in the island’s modern history.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
director: 林君昵 LIN Chunni、黃邦銓 HUANG Pang-chuan
synopsis: 2026 紐約現代美術館紀錄片雙週影展 MoMA Doc Fortnight Festival 2025 金馬獎入圍最佳紀錄片、原創電影音樂 Nominated for Best Documentary Film & Best Original Film Score, Golden Horse Awards 《甘露水》是台灣首位現代雕塑家黃土水於1921年創作的大理石裸女像，也是一尊靜默守望的雕像。它靜靜凝視著台灣近百年來的歷史軌跡，從日治時期到白色恐怖的壓抑與掙扎，這件作品映照出一座島嶼的苦難與蛻變，彷彿以無聲之姿，見證著歷史的風霜與人們的堅韌。 歷經三年的拍攝與打磨，《甘露水》記錄了守護石像超過六十載的張氏家族，以及促成作品重見天日的林曼麗教授。導演林君昵與黃邦銓以16毫米底片拍攝，透過底片的物質特性回應大理石的質感與時間感，結合第一手訪談與嚴謹的歷史調查，追尋作品的創作源頭與流轉再現。 *片商交換券不適用於國家電影及視聽文化中心所有場次
source_language_note: 發音：國語﹑台語﹑日語 字幕：中文▲ ▲ 影片拷貝非英語發音且無英文字幕 Non-English language film without English subtitles.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: 大理石裸女雕像「甘露水」，1921年由黃土水完成，為台灣藝術瑰寶。曾遭潑墨蒙垢，亦曾棄置街頭，沉眠木箱近半世紀，終以國寶之姿甦醒昂首。雙導演赴日踏尋前輩求學足跡，叩訪戰後收藏者台中張家，採集日治的啟蒙微光、戰後的白恐陰影，不僅聚焦作品，更藉其為稜鏡，折射島民時代浮沉。化招牌膠卷攝影為鑿刀，細摹石材紋理手痕，召喚一生懸命創作魂，共臻法喜之境。
tmdb_overview_en: Daughter of Nectar, a gracefully carved marble nude from 1921 by Huang Tu-shui, Taiwan's inaugural modern sculptor, encapsulates a complex century of Taiwanese history, spanning from Japanese colonisation to Chiang Kai-shek's authoritarian rule and the White Terror era. This sculpture, both delicate and resilient, stands as a silent sentinel, mirroring the enduring struggles, suppressed voices, and profound cultural transformations of its homeland.

synopsis: 柯南、小蘭、園子、小五郎一行人，與熱愛重機的世良真純一同前往橫濱‧港未來，參加車界盛會「神奈川機車大展」。就在這時候，突然出現一台暴走的神秘黑色機車，從柯南他們搭乘的車輛上空飛越而過，而緊追在後的，是小蘭之前曾見過的「風之女神」神奈川縣警交通機動隊成員萩原千速。在經歷一場激烈的追逐戰之後，千速騎乘的機車嚴重受損，僅只一步之差，最後還是被犯人逃脫了。 柯南等人順利抵達橫濱的活動會場，場內正在發表搭載最新科技的警用機車「天使」。有消息指出那台暴走的黑色機車出現在東京都內，並且完全擺脫警視廳的追捕。雖然那台黑色機車暴走之目的不明，但其外型卻與全新登場的「天使」十分相似，號稱黑色天使「路西法」，持續被警方追緝中。 犯人的真實身分與目的究竟是什麼？而且不知為何，千速的腦海竟浮現弟弟萩原研二與其同期好友松田陣平的記憶…… 風之女神VS黑暗墮天使 掀起一陣狂潮的旋風，史上最速極限之戰，即將引爆！！
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

movie_title_en: The Pig, The Snake and The Pigeon
synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔15） ★2023 金馬獎最佳動作設計；最佳導演、最佳男主角、最佳剪輯等7項提名 ★2024 香港電影金像獎最佳亞洲華語電影 ★2024 台北電影節最佳男主角、最佳男配角；最佳劇情長片、最佳導演、最佳編劇等14項提名 「三害不除，何樂之有？」通緝犯陳桂林在角頭大哥告別式上囂張尋仇，卻發現自己竟然只是排名第三的通緝犯。他查出前二名通緝犯的下落，要將他們一一除掉，以為自己已成為當代的周處除三害，卻沒想到永遠參不透的貪嗔癡，才是人生終要面對的罪與罰。 https://reurl.cc/N2o4ap
tmdb_title: The Pig, the Snake and the Pigeon
tmdb_title_en: The Pig, the Snake and the Pigeon
tmdb_overview: 一個野心勃勃的罪犯發現自己在台灣通緝要犯排行榜竟然屈居第三，決定要除掉在他前面的兩個人。
tmdb_overview_en: The arrogant, third most-wanted criminal in Taiwan, decides to get rid of the top two competitors and crowns himself the most-wanted criminal before dying.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title: 父親的秘密 + 漂浮氣球
synopsis: 1998 坎城影展短片競賽評審團獎 Jury Prize for Short Film, Cannes FF 1998 英國影藝學院獎最佳短片提名 Nominated for Best Short Film, BAFTA Awards 1998 盧卡諾影展明日之豹競賽最佳影片 Best Film, Pardi di domani, Locarno FF 聖誕前夕，天真無憂的女孩琳恩隨父親和弟弟出遊，來到城市邊緣的荒廢鐵道，目睹一位神秘女子將兩名年幼孩童託付給父親。面對突如其來的新玩伴，琳恩興奮又好奇，直到一場喧鬧的酒吧聚會中，她看著陌生的小女孩依偎在父親懷中，一股不安與妒意湧現，她才明白：原來她不是父親唯一的寶貝。 琳恩倫賽二度於坎城競賽獲獎的短片傑作，從懵懂的兒童視角瞥見成人世界的複雜，巧妙鋪墊日常即景的局部特寫、細碎聲響的感官餘韻，道出一則關於成長與幻滅的童年往事。詩意的音畫調度、渾然天成的非職業兒童表演，亦預示了隔年一鳴驚人的長片首作《漂浮氣球》。 漂浮氣球 Ratcatcher 琳恩倫賽 Lynne RAMSAY｜英國 UK、法國 France｜1999｜DCP ｜Color｜94min 1999 坎城影展一種注目 Un Certain Regard, Cannes FF 1999 英國影藝學院獎最佳潛力新人 Most Promising Newcomer, BAFTA Awards 1999 倫敦影展薩瑟蘭獎 Sutherland Trophy, BFI London FF 1999 芝加哥影展最佳導演 Best Director, Chicago IFF 1970年代的格拉斯哥，垃圾清潔隊集體罷工，街上鼠患猖獗、氣味沖天。12歲少年詹姆斯與朋友在河邊戲水打鬧，一場突發意外令他倉皇逃離，自此將罪疚深鎖於緘默之中。他鎮日在外遊蕩，與受欺凌的渴愛少女、天真的鄰居男孩建立無邪情誼。漂流在失序家庭與破敗街角，他渴望遠離苦悶現實，夜晚夢見寵物鼠隨紅氣球昇入宇宙深處；白天醒來，他搭上一輛不知前往何方的公車，逃離荒涼國宅社區，在遠方田野尋找喘息的出口。 琳恩倫賽技驚四座的首部長片，展現出自成一格的音畫錯位詩學，以悠緩敘事片段拼綴記憶的解離與流動，從底層生活淬鍊抒情幻想，將殘酷童年寫成一首靈光流淌的詩篇。
tags: 致受傷的靈魂：琳恩倫賽
source_language_note: 發音：英語 字幕：中文
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
**Gasman**
Jury Prize for Short Film, Cannes FF 1998
Nominated for Best Short Film, BAFTA Awards 1998
Best Film, Pardi di domani, Locarno FF

On Christmas Eve, innocent and carefree Lynne goes on an outing with her father and brother to a derelict railway on the edge of town. There, she witnesses a mysterious woman entrusting two young children to her father. Lynne is initially excited and curious about her new playmates, until a boisterous pub gathering where she watches a strange little girl nestle in her father's arms. A wave of unease and jealousy washes over her as she realizes she is not her father’s only "precious one."

Lynne Ramsay’s second award-winning short at Cannes captures the complexities of the adult world through a child’s naive perspective. With masterful use of close-ups and sensory soundscapes, it tells a childhood tale of growth and disillusionment. Its poetic audio-visual direction and natural performances by non-professional child actors foreshadowed her stunning feature debut the following year, *Ratcatcher*.

***

**Ratcatcher**
Lynne RAMSAY｜UK, France｜1999｜DCP｜Color｜94min

Un Certain Regard, Cannes FF 1999
Most Promising Newcomer, BAFTA Awards 1999
Sutherland Trophy, BFI London FF 1999
Best Director, Chicago IFF 1999

In 1970s Glasgow, a massive garbage strike has left the streets infested with rats and a lingering stench. Twelve-year-old James is playing by the canal with a friend when a sudden accident occurs, causing him to flee in panic and bury his guilt in silence. He spends his days wandering, forming innocent bonds with a bullied, love-starved girl and a naive neighbor boy. Drifting between a dysfunctional home and decaying street corners, he yearns to escape his bleak reality. At night, he dreams of his pet rat ascending into the cosmos on a red balloon; by day, he boards a bus to nowhere, escaping his desolate housing estate to find a moment of peace in the distant fields.

Lynne Ramsay’s breathtaking debut feature showcases her unique poetics of audio-visual displacement. Using slow, fragmented narrative beats to piece together the dissociation and flow of memory, she extracts lyrical fantasy from the hardships of the lower class, turning a cruel childhood into a poem shimmering with grace.

movie_title: 【嬰兒車電影院】雙鼠奇謀（國語）
movie_title_en: Super Furball and the Lying Squirrel
synopsis: 十一歲的愛蜜莉亞被自己心愛的天竺鼠咬了一口後，從此獲得了能變身為「超級鼠寶」的神奇能力，這股力量讓她肩負起守護自然與動物的使命，她的力量來自一只特別的水瓶，然而當水瓶意外落入他人手中，愛蜜莉亞面臨前所未有的考驗，在旅途中，她結識了一隻性格獨特的松鼠，兩人攜手合作，對抗困難與陰謀，也從中明白成為真正英雄的意義。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 來自單親家庭的平凡女孩艾蜜莉亞，在被她的天竺鼠寵物咬了之後，意外獲得超自然的力量，變身成一隻毛茸茸的超級倉鼠。為了拯救面臨危機的蜜蜂與人類，艾蜜莉亞將搭乘時光機穿梭在未來與現在之間，展開一場關乎勇氣、友情和互相理解的時空之旅！
tmdb_overview_en: To save the world, Super Furball has to save the bees. In order to do so, the heroic guinea pig has to redeem the biggest bully in school.

synopsis: 照片是凝望過去的切片，永存著時間見證的那一刻。七〇年代臺灣街頭，選舉造勢聲此起彼落，各方政治勢力風雲湧動。有閱讀障礙、喜愛攝影的少女賢英身邊，總有青梅竹馬弘國陪伴，他替她讀懂每個未解的字句，她卻期待不同於日常的未知。來臺交流的韓國跆拳道教練浩熙吸引了她的目光，情竇初開伴隨著青春的苦澀。然而，從縣長投票的那天起，一切都不再相同⋯⋯
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 中文、臺、客、韓、英語發音/中、英文字幕
tmdb_overview: 1977年，台灣中壢市選舉陷入動盪，攝影師賢英在混亂中遇見韓國跆拳道教練金浩熙。金浩熙不懂中文，靠好友弘國翻譯，三人成為好友，經常外出拍攝。隨著感情加深，金浩熙鼓勵賢英參加香港攝影比賽，並邀她去合歡山拍雪景。然而，賢英因不曾見過雪且對兩人未來感到迷茫而猶豫。她最終決定冒險，但生日當天卻因迷路錯過與金浩熙的會面⋯⋯
tmdb_overview_en: Set in 1977 Zhongli, Taiwan, amidst election turmoil, photographer Hsien-ying forms deep connections with Korean Taekwondo coach Chin Hao-hsi and childhood friend Hung-kuo. Encouraged to chase her dreams, Hsien-ying faces hesitation and tragedy as political chaos and personal loss reshape her life and perspective.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title: 芭比之夢幻仙境 美人魚芭比
director: 沃爾特馬提修斯 Walter P. MARTISHIUS、劉威廉 William LAU
synopsis: 延續夢幻仙境的故事，愛莉娜來到水底的人魚王國，為了拯救被綁架的人魚王子拿路。邪惡的露雲娜再次崛起，威脅人魚王子為她尋找一種魔法強大的莓果，能讓擁有者成為夢幻仙境中最有力量的仙子。愛莉娜必須阻擋他們，但困難重重。她需要獲得固執人魚女孩的信任，還得克服在水中移動的障礙。然而，艾莉娜這次最艱困的挑戰，是必須做出她這輩子最大的犧牲。 –
source_language_note: 發音：國語 字幕：中文▲ ▲ 影片拷貝非英語發音且無英文字幕 Non-English language film without English subtitles.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: In this animated follow-up to Fairytopia, Elina enlists the help of a mermaid, Nori, to save her friend Nalu, a merman prince who has been captured by the wicked Laverna.
tmdb_overview_en: In this animated follow-up to Fairytopia, Elina enlists the help of a mermaid, Nori, to save her friend Nalu, a merman prince who has been captured by the wicked Laverna.

synopsis: 柯南、小蘭、園子、小五郎一行人，與熱愛重機的世良真純一同前往橫濱‧港未來，參加車界盛會「神奈川機車大展」。就在這時候，突然出現一台暴走的神秘黑色機車，從柯南他們搭乘的車輛上空飛越而過，而緊追在後的，是小蘭之前曾見過的「風之女神」神奈川縣警交通機動隊成員萩原千速。在經歷一場激烈的追逐戰之後，千速騎乘的機車嚴重受損，僅只一步之差，最後還是被犯人逃脫了。 柯南等人順利抵達橫濱的活動會場，場內正在發表搭載最新科技的警用機車「天使」。有消息指出那台暴走的黑色機車出現在東京都內，並且完全擺脫警視廳的追捕。雖然那台黑色機車暴走之目的不明，但其外型卻與全新登場的「天使」十分相似，號稱黑色天使「路西法」，持續被警方追緝中。 犯人的真實身分與目的究竟是什麼？而且不知為何，千速的腦海竟浮現弟弟萩原研二與其同期好友松田陣平的記憶…… 風之女神VS黑暗墮天使 掀起一陣狂潮的旋風，史上最速極限之戰，即將引爆！！
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

synopsis: 桃5線道，一邊是軍用機場，一邊是民用機場，短短六公里，見證臺灣軍事及經濟間的變化。自戰前的日本殖民時期，冷戰時期的臺美軍事合作、1970年代的桃園國際機場興建，至現今的桃園航空城計畫，在歷史變遷的長廊中，從空軍基地走入歷史、到眷村和學校先後離散，隨著都市計畫拆遷，消逝在世人眼前。
source_language_note: 語言 國、臺語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 桃5線道，一邊是軍用機場，一邊是民用機場，短短六公里，見證臺灣軍事及經濟間的變化。自戰前的日本殖民時期，冷戰時期的臺美軍事合作、1970年代的桃園國際機場興建，至現今的桃園航空城計畫，在歷史變遷的長廊中，從空軍基地走入歷史、到眷村和學校先後離散，隨著都市計畫拆遷，消逝在世人眼前。
synopsis_en: Along the six-kilometer stretch of Tao 5 Road, a military airfield sits on one side and a civilian airport on the other, bearing witness to the evolution of Taiwan’s military and economic landscape. From the pre-war Japanese colonial era and Cold War-era military cooperation between Taiwan and the U.S., to the construction of Taoyuan International Airport in the 1970s and the current Taoyuan Aerotropolis project, this corridor of history has seen the air force base fade into the past and military dependents' villages and schools gradually disperse. Following the path of urban redevelopment and demolition, these landmarks are vanishing from the world's eyes.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1985 金馬獎最佳美術設計、服裝設計 Best Art Direction & Best Costume Design, Golden Horse Awards 1985 亞太影展最佳美術、攝影 Best Art Direction & Cinematography, Asia-Pacific FF 盪亂的唐末，一幫打家劫舍的盜匪因荒年而走投無路，遂挾持烏家莊村長之女當作人質，威脅村民交出米糧，不料最後卻被軍隊埋伏圍剿。當首領被斬首示眾，弟兄們亦死傷大半，一群殘兵敗卒開始內鬥，村長的女兒「彈珠」一度趁亂逃跑，卻被匪寇之一的何南抓回，兩人朝夕相處下漸生情愫，展開一段愛恨交織的複雜情感……。
source_language_note: 發音：國語 字幕：中英字
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
1985 Golden Horse Awards: Best Art Direction, Best Costume Design
1985 Asia-Pacific Film Festival: Best Art Direction, Best Cinematography

During the chaotic final years of the Tang Dynasty, a band of desperate outlaws, driven to the brink by famine, kidnaps the daughter of the Wu Village chief to hold as a hostage, demanding grain from the villagers. However, they are ultimately ambushed and decimated by the army. With their leader publicly beheaded and most of their comrades dead or wounded, the surviving stragglers descend into internal strife. The chief's daughter, Danzhu, attempts to escape amidst the chaos but is recaptured by one of the bandits, He Nan. As the two spend their days and nights together, feelings begin to blossom, sparking a complex relationship woven with both love and hate.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: We Need to Talk About Kevin
synopsis: 2011 坎城影展正式競賽 Competition, Cannes FF 2011 英國獨立電影獎最佳導演 Best Director, British Independent Film Awards 2011 歐洲電影獎最佳女演員 Best Actress, European Film Awards 2012 金球獎戲劇類最佳女演員提名 Nominated for Best Actress (Drama), Golden Globes 伊娃 曾有自由的人生，卻因意外懷孕成為全職母親，迎來聰慧早熟的逆子 凱文 。他彷彿魔童降世，自幼便看穿 伊娃 匱乏的母愛，以天真無知包裝惡意挑釁，反覆試探她的底限，更在父親面前扮演乖孩子，以操弄家人的情緒起伏。進入青春期後， 凱文 的反常人格讓伊娃焦慮不安，隨後一場血腥的校園攻擊，更使她深陷無盡自責的煉獄。 翻拍美國女作家同名小說，琳恩倫賽大幅刪減原著，以今昔交錯的非線性結構，逐步爬梳 凱文 的成長軌跡，沉痛地質問：邪惡究竟是天生或養成？母職是無私本能，還是人性枷鎖？導演拒絕提供解答或救贖，改以色彩濃烈、衝擊感官的視聽語言，緊糾觀眾每根神經，跟隨主角展開一段段艱難的靈魂拷問。
tags: 致受傷的靈魂：琳恩倫賽

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title: 該死的一天 + 默文卡拉
synopsis: 1997 克萊蒙費宏影展評審團特別獎 Special Jury Prize, Clermont-Ferrand International Short FF 1997 布雷斯特歐洲短片影展法國競賽首獎 1998 鹿特丹影展 IFF Rotterdam 一名男子蝸居於狹小斗室，空氣靜默得令人窒息，他的思緒在破碎記憶間游移：行竊入獄的經過、獄中孤絕的規律日常、牢房裡毒癮發作的煎熬、青春期在河岸遊蕩時的無端惡行 …… ，以及那段唯一綻發著金黃陽光，在田野與玩伴嬉戲的無憂童年 。 琳恩倫賽的第二部短片作品，開啟她對於邊緣缺陷人物的深度關注，透過迷亂的非線性敘事、不同時間軸交互滲透的聲音殘響，以及撫觸肌膚般的身體官能意象，描摹一名毒癮者的枯槁形體及混亂內在，深化她一貫對創傷經驗、感知裂隙的美學探索。 默文卡拉 Morvern Callar 琳恩倫賽 Lynne RAMSAY｜英國 UK、加拿大 Canada｜2002｜DCP ｜Color｜97min 2002 坎城影展導演雙週CICAE獎、青年評審團獎 CICAE Award & Award of the Youth, Directors' Fortnight 2002 英國獨立電影獎最佳女演員、技術成就獎 Best Actress & Best Technical Achievement, British Independent Film Awards 2002 歐洲電影獎最佳女演員、攝影提名 Nominated for Best Actress & Best Cinematographer, European Film Awards 超市女店員 默文 一覺醒來，發現男友自殺陳屍公寓，僅留下一筆存款、一捲錄音帶，和一份未出版的小說書稿。她沒有報警，反而冷靜清理好現場，並在小說作者欄寫下自己名字後寄至出版社，一段屬於她的旅程就此展開。她與閨蜜逃離寒冷陰鬱的蘇格蘭，遠赴陽光炙熱的西班牙海岸。遊走於斷裂而陌生的風景時，她開始理解一切空虛的根源，以及那份渴望放逐的蠢動慾望。 改編自毛姆獎同名小說，本片宛如卡繆《異鄉人》的當代變奏，以低限敘事、攝人光影，深潛主角擺盪於哀悼與狂歡間的奇異狀態。全片聲景由男友遺留的混音帶貫串，選用地下絲絨、艾費克斯雙胞胎等樂團金曲，在碎裂聲光與節奏中書寫疏離，勾勒主角無處安放的漂泊靈魂。
tags: 致受傷的靈魂：琳恩倫賽
英國獨立電影獎最佳女演員
source_language_note: 發音：英語 字幕：中文
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
**Kill the Day**
1997 Special Jury Prize, Clermont-Ferrand International Short Film Festival
1997 Grand Prix (French Competition), Brest European Short Film Festival
1998 International Film Festival Rotterdam

A man lives confined in a cramped room where the silence is suffocating. His thoughts drift through fragmented memories: the theft that led to his imprisonment, the desolate routine of prison life, the agony of withdrawal in a cell, senseless teenage acts of delinquency by a riverbank... and a single, golden childhood memory of playing in the fields with friends. Lynne Ramsay’s second short film marks the beginning of her deep fascination with marginalized and flawed characters. Through a disorienting non-linear narrative, overlapping soundscapes across different timelines, and tactile, sensory imagery, she portrays the withered body and chaotic inner world of an addict, furthering her aesthetic exploration of traumatic experiences and sensory fissures.

***

**Morvern Callar**
Lynne RAMSAY｜UK, Canada｜2002｜DCP｜Color｜97min

2002 CICAE Award & Award of the Youth, Directors' Fortnight, Cannes Film Festival
2002 Best Actress & Best Technical Achievement, British Independent Film Awards
2002 Nominated for Best Actress & Best Cinematographer, European Film Awards

Morvern, a supermarket clerk, wakes up to find her boyfriend has committed suicide in their apartment, leaving behind a sum of money, a mixtape, and an unpublished manuscript. Instead of calling the police, she calmly cleans the scene, replaces his name with hers on the manuscript, and sends it to a publisher. Thus begins her journey. She and her best friend flee the cold, gloomy skies of Scotland for the sun-drenched coast of Spain. Wandering through disjointed and unfamiliar landscapes, she begins to grasp the root of her emptiness and the restless urge for self-exile. 

Adapted from the Somerset Maugham Award-winning novel, the film serves as a contemporary variation of Camus’s *The Stranger*. With a minimalist narrative and captivating cinematography, it dives deep into the protagonist’s strange state, oscillating between mourning and revelry. The film’s soundscape is driven by the boyfriend’s mixtape, featuring tracks by The Velvet Underground and Aphex Twin, using fragmented light and rhythm to articulate alienation and the drifting soul of a woman with nowhere to belong.

Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

synopsis: 柯南、小蘭、園子、小五郎一行人，與熱愛重機的世良真純一同前往橫濱‧港未來，參加車界盛會「神奈川機車大展」。就在這時候，突然出現一台暴走的神秘黑色機車，從柯南他們搭乘的車輛上空飛越而過，而緊追在後的，是小蘭之前曾見過的「風之女神」神奈川縣警交通機動隊成員萩原千速。在經歷一場激烈的追逐戰之後，千速騎乘的機車嚴重受損，僅只一步之差，最後還是被犯人逃脫了。 柯南等人順利抵達橫濱的活動會場，場內正在發表搭載最新科技的警用機車「天使」。有消息指出那台暴走的黑色機車出現在東京都內，並且完全擺脫警視廳的追捕。雖然那台黑色機車暴走之目的不明，但其外型卻與全新登場的「天使」十分相似，號稱黑色天使「路西法」，持續被警方追緝中。 犯人的真實身分與目的究竟是什麼？而且不知為何，千速的腦海竟浮現弟弟萩原研二與其同期好友松田陣平的記憶…… 風之女神VS黑暗墮天使 掀起一陣狂潮的旋風，史上最速極限之戰，即將引爆！！
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

synopsis: 「物質世界」策展人開講 『策展人開講』是北美館邀請特定展覽的策展人針對該展作深入導覽與策展分享活動，本次活動由本展策展人馮馨帶領探索「物質世界」展覽中的四個主題作品。 活動時間｜2026年7月11日（六）下午2:00-3:30 活動地點｜本館二樓展覽室 報到地點｜二樓2B展覽室入口 參加人數｜20人 活動介紹 物質塑造著人類的生活方式。 我們每日一張開眼，從喝水的杯子、穿著的衣物、居住的空間、已不僅是通訊功能的手機，食衣住行育樂，所有的一切被物質所圍繞著。因應生活所需，物被不斷創造、發明、改良、演進，物被人所用，又因為使用而延伸出系統，系統回過頭化為生活中的直覺動作，甚至人們也因為使用被影響了原本的姿態、習慣甚至是思維模式。 從70年代布希亞（Jean Baudrillard）揭示了消費社會中的符號價值，到90年代提姆．登特（Tim Dant）與斯蒂格勒（Bernard Stiegler）探討的物質實踐，物質不單單只是被消費或指涉意義，它也在日常的操作、使用與感知中，形成由物而衍伸的技術，進而影響人們的行動模式與社會的樣態。 展覽試圖回望從農業社會轉變為工商社會之際至今，物質的生產與流通如何深刻改變諸多事物。小至我們的生活型態，大至推動、介入社會運作的機制，與隱沒在其後的力量。我們好奇物質是如何在社會、空間、尺度與感知中持續生成世界，而不同時期的創作者又是如何轉化時代性的感受，成為物質性的創作與實驗呈現，進一步回應我們伴隨其所改變的感知與想像。 講者介紹 馮馨 現任臺北市立美術館助理研究員。近年研究著重於臺灣聲音藝術、新媒體藝術與當代文化展演發展，以及數位技術發展如何影響大眾的行為與感知。近年策展精選：「歷史變體」（2018，TKG+ Project）、「動態圖層」（2021，台北當代藝術館）、「線下真實」（2022，福利社）、「天天上演」（2024，嘉義市立美術館）；協同策展2023浪漫台三線藝術季．藝術策展「淺山行路人」、「顯影．現聲：臺灣影視聽文物展」（2022，國家電影及視聽文化中心）。《臺灣當代藝術策展二十年》（2015）共同作者與編輯。 ________________________________________________________________________ * 本活動採預約報名制，額滿為止。(6/16(二)10:00開放預約) * 活動當日13:40開放報到與現場登記候補，已預約報名而未於14:00前完成報到者，名額將讓予候補觀眾。 * 本活動需租借導覽子機，敬請備妥有效證件（身分證、健保卡、學生證或護照），於活動報到處換證租借。 * 本活動免費參與，須先行購買門票入館，並請配合 觀展與購票須知 。
screen_name: 二樓2A ~2B
synopsis_en:
**Curator’s Talk: "The Material World"**

"Curator’s Talk" is a series hosted by the Taipei Fine Arts Museum (TFAM), inviting curators to provide in-depth guided tours and share their insights on specific exhibitions. In this session, curator Feng Hsin will lead an exploration of four thematic works within "The Material World."

**Event Time:** Saturday, July 11, 2026, 2:00 PM – 3:30 PM
**Venue:** 2nd Floor Exhibition Rooms, TFAM
**Check-in Location:** Entrance of Exhibition Room 2B
**Capacity:** 20 participants

**About the Event**
Matter shapes the way we live. From the moment we open our eyes, we are surrounded by material objects: the cups we drink from, the clothes we wear, the spaces we inhabit, and the smartphones that have evolved far beyond mere communication tools. Every facet of daily life—food, clothing, housing, transportation, and entertainment—is defined by matter. To meet the demands of life, objects are constantly created, invented, improved, and evolved. Humans use objects, and through that use, systems emerge. These systems, in turn, become intuitive actions in our daily lives; our postures, habits, and even our modes of thought are influenced by the things we use.

From Jean Baudrillard’s revelation of "sign value" in consumer society in the 1970s to Tim Dant and Bernard Stiegler’s exploration of "material practice" in the 1990s, matter is more than just a commodity or a reference of meaning. Through daily operation, use, and perception, it forms "object-derived technologies" that influence human patterns of action and the very fabric of society.

This exhibition looks back at the transition from agricultural to industrial and commercial society, examining how the production and circulation of matter have profoundly altered our world—from individual lifestyles to the large-scale mechanisms and hidden forces that drive social operations. We explore how matter continues to "generate" the world across different scales and perceptions, and how artists of different eras have translated the sensibilities of their times into material creations and experimental presentations, responding to the shifting perceptions and imaginations that accompany these changes.

**About the Speaker**
**Feng Hsin** is an Assistant Curator at the Taipei Fine Arts Museum. Her recent research focuses on the development of sound art, new media art, and contemporary cultural performance in Taiwan, as well as how digital technology influences public behavior and perception. 

Selected curatorial projects include: *Historical Variations* (2018, TKG+ Project), *Dynamic Layers* (2021, Museum of Contemporary Art Taipei), *Offline Reality* (2022, FreeS Art Space), and *Everyday Performance* (2024, Chiayi City Museum). She served as co-curator for the 2023 Romantic Route 3 Art Festival ("Travelers on the Foothills") and *Visible/Audible: Exhibition of Artifacts from Taiwan’s Film and Audiovisual History* (2022, Taiwan Film and Audiovisual Institute). She is also the co-author and editor of *Twenty Years of Contemporary Art Curating in Taiwan* (2015).

***

*   Registration is required and is available on a first-come, first-served basis. (Reservations open on Tuesday, June 16, at 10:00 AM).
*   Check-in and on-site waitlisting begin at 1:40 PM on the day of the event. For those with reservations, spots not claimed by 2:00 PM will be released to the waitlist.
*   Audio guide receivers are required for this event. Please bring a valid ID (ID card, health insurance card, student ID, or passport) to exchange for the rental at the check-in desk.
*   Participation in the talk is free, but attendees must purchase a museum admission ticket and follow the museum’s visiting and ticketing guidelines.

tmdb_overview_en: A washed-up '80s pop star gets a chance at a comeback when reigning pop diva Cora Corman invites him to write & record a duet with her, but there's a problem--Alex hasn't written a song in years; he's never written lyrics and he has to come up with a hit in a matter of days.

movie_title: 台北福隆來回接駁車＋海灘電影院套票
synopsis: KKday接駁車服務 讓大家能夠更方便地來往福隆，今天我們特別跟Skyline Film by Sea 合作，推出了 1.活動門票＋來回接駁一站搞定套票 票券包含：臺北車站 ↔ 福隆海水浴場來回車票＋電影票券＋福隆海水浴場門票
screen_name: 福隆海水浴場
synopsis_en: KKday’s shuttle service makes traveling to and from Fulong more convenient than ever. In a special collaboration with Skyline Film by Sea, we are now offering an all-in-one package that covers both event tickets and round-trip transportation. This package includes: Round-trip shuttle between Taipei Main Station and Fulong Beach + Movie ticket + Fulong Beach admission.

movie_title: 福隆前往台北回程接駁車
synopsis: KKday接駁車服務 票券包含：福隆 → 台北車站 （不包含門票） 票券費用：NT: 400
screen_name: 福隆海水浴場
synopsis_en:
KKday Shuttle Service
Ticket includes: Fulong → Taipei Main Station (Admission tickets not included)
